inline_comments.message:
Question: If you are adding changes to decode in toAuthoritative method in the jpa class, why it needs to be docoded again here?
Isn't it already decoded https://github.com/onap/policy-pap/blob/master/main/src/main/java/org/onap/policy/pap/main/service/ToscaNodeTemplateService.java#L61 ?

Yes, You are right, I just realised my local pap code has been using old models version while testing due to which the metadata was not decoded in pap. I will re-run my local setup and discard this review after testing once. Thanks
